name: Improvado Enterprise Marketing Analytics API
what_it_does: Improvado enterprise marketing analytics REST API and data pipeline platform for large marketing teams and agencies to extract, harmonize, and centralize marketing performance data from 500+ data sources into a unified marketing data warehouse with AI-powered analysis, cross-channel attribution, and executive dashboards for enterprise marketing intelligence automation. Enables AI agents to manage marketing data source connection for enterprise ETL automation, handle cross-channel data harmonization for unified marketing analytics automation, access campaign performance aggregation for executive dashboard automation, retrieve AI-powered marketing insight for strategic marketing automation, manage custom data transformation for tailored attribution automation, handle data destination sync to BigQuery, Snowflake, and Redshift for marketing data warehouse automation, access marketing anomaly detection for performance alert automation, retrieve media plan vs actual comparison for budget management automation, manage agency multi-client data isolation for enterprise agency automation, and integrate Improvado with enterprise BI, analytics, and marketing platforms for end-to-end enterprise marketing intelligence.
use_cases: Centralizing 500+ marketing data sources from enterprise ETL pipeline agents
Harmonizing cross-channel marketing data from unified analytics agents
Building executive marketing dashboards from performance reporting agents
Managing agency multi-client data from enterprise agency intelligence agents
not_for: SMB marketing analytics (Improvado is enterprise-priced for large teams)
Consumer-level attribution (use Northbeam or Rockerbox for DTC attribution)
Real-time bidding (Improvado is analytics/reporting, not campaign management)
best_when: A large enterprise marketing team or agency wanting AI agents to automate marketing data extraction from 500+ sources, harmonization, and analytics through Improvado's enterprise-grade marketing intelligence platform.
avoid_when: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRES IMPROVADO TEAM: Improvado enterprise implementation requires onboarding with Improvado solutions team for data mapping and custom transformation; automated self-service integration requires enterprise account; automated standalone API integration without implementation support creates limited harmonization capability. API ACCESS IS ENTERPRISE-TIER ONLY: Improvado API access requires enterprise contract; automated API pipeline for non-enterprise customers creates unauthorized access; automated programmatic data access must be validated against plan tier. DATA HARMONIZATION CONFIGURATION COMPLEXITY: Improvado cross-source data harmonization requires custom mapping of field names across sources; automated integration must configure field mapping per source; automated assumption of auto-harmonization without configuration creates raw source-format data rather than unified model. REFRESH SCHEDULE vs REAL-TIME LATENCY: Improvado data refreshes on configured schedule (typically hourly to daily); automated real-time performance decisions on Improvado data creates latency surprise; automated in-flight campaign optimization should verify data freshness before action.

auth.notes: Improvado uses API key and OAuth for data source connections. REST API with JSON. San Diego, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Artyom Voronetskiy. Backed by Updata Partners, Craft Ventures, Eniac Ventures ($34M raised). Products: 500+ connectors, data harmonization, AI analytics, executive dashboards, agency multi-client management. No webhooks. GDPR. SOC2. Serves enterprise marketing teams and agencies. Competes with Supermetrics and Funnel.io for enterprise marketing data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing; typically $2,000-$20,000+/month based on data volume
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. Updata backed. Custom enterprise pricing. Annual contract typical. Implementation included.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; data query and export APIs throttled; no real-time webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: API DOCUMENTATION IS ENTERPRISE-GATED: Improvado API documentation requires enterprise customer access; automated integration requires Improvado account and documentation access; automated self-service integration without account creates undocumented endpoint challenge

DATA SCHEMA IS IMPROVADO-UNIFIED NOT SOURCE-NATIVE: Improvado exposes unified schema across sources, not raw source fields; automated data consumers must use Improvado unified field names; automated query using native ad platform field names creates field not found error

NO WEBHOOK COMPLETION NOTIFICATIONS: Improvado does not provide webhooks for data refresh completion; automated downstream processing must use scheduled polling or time-based delay; automated immediate downstream processing creates stale data risk

MULTI-CLIENT DATA ISOLATION IN AGENCY ACCOUNTS: Improvado agency accounts have workspace-level isolation; automated API access must scope to correct client workspace; automated cross-client data access creates permission denied error

CONNECTOR OAUTH TOKEN DEPENDENCY: Improvado connector tokens to ad platforms expire; automated pipeline fails when ad platform OAuth expires; automated monitoring must detect connector authentication errors and alert for reauthorization
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise marketing analytics. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Ad platform and attribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise marketing. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Marketing and ad data.
